'''Yarsroot''' was a [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] chef who worked on the [[Lady Luck/Legends|''Lady Luck'']] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. He was a part of the plan to turn over the [[Myrkr strike team]] so they could destroy the [[voxyn]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}}
